text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 12

ca_routine: RECODE : Last 6 mths, make in-person/phone/video appointment for check-up or routine care

SAS Format: YNA

1: YES

2: NO
 ca_rtnasaw: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often get appt for routine care as soon as needed

SAS Format: OFA

1: NEVER

2: SOMETIMES

3: USUALLY

4: ALWAYS

ca_visits: RECODE : Last 6 mths, how many in-person/phone/video visits for health care

SAS Format: NMA

0: NONE

1: 1 TIME

2: 2

3: 3

4: 4

5: 5 TO 9

6: 10 OR MORE
